subject: Boxue/bianlun: Moderate structured debate and synthesize refined hypothesis
description:
Boxue delegation plan: boxue_1783776473717891400
Project: What is the future for energy storage? — The Limits of Battery Performance and the Interplay of Chemistry, Materials Science, and Scalability (sci_1783776447386032700)
Domain: Energy Storage / Lithium-ion Batteries / Post-Lithium Systems / Materials Science / Electrochemistry / Battery Recycling / Techno-Economic Analysis
Project objective: 围绕一个可证伪的科学问题：'电极材料（如钴酸锂、磷酸铁锂、硫正极）的固有化学稳定性、电解液分解电位、锂/钠离子迁移动力学以及固态电解质界面（SEI）的演化，是否共同决定了一个明确的能量密度上限（例如 < 500 Wh/kg）和循环寿命阈值（例如 < 10,000次，在80%容量保持率下），从而在技术和经济可行性上构成固态/液态电池的固有极限；该上限是否可以通过全新的化学体系（如锂-硫、锂-空气、钠离子）或梯度浓度/纳米结构工程被实质性突破？'
Round goal: 不要泛泛讨论‘储能技术的未来’。围绕一个可证伪的科学问题：'电极材料（如钴酸锂、磷酸铁锂、硫正极）的固有化学稳定性、电解液分解电位、锂/钠离子迁移动力学以及固态电解质界面（SEI）的演化，是否共同决定了一个明确的能量密度上限（例如 < 500 Wh/kg）和循环寿命阈值（例如 < 10,000次，在80%容量保持率下），从而在技术和经济可行性上构成固态/液态电池的固有极限；该上限是否可以通过全新的化学体系（如锂-硫、锂-空气、钠离子）或梯度浓度/纳米结构工程被实质性突破？'
Assigned agent: bianlun
Phase: Socratic Debate
Priority: medium
Allowed/expected tools: run_socratic_hypothesis_debate, moderate_round, summarize_positions, extract_emergent_method

Task:
Integrate proposer and critic positions, identify disagreements, and produce refined hypotheses.

Deliverable:
Debate record with convergence points, unresolved issues, and emergent methods.

Acceptance criteria:
- Arguments are separated into factual vs conceptual disagreements
- Refined hypothesis lists improvements from critique
- Remaining risks are explicit

Known risks to handle:
- false consensus
- debate loops without synthesis

Role boundary: complete only this specialist responsibility. Do not take over Boxue coordination, do not invent evidence, and mark unsupported claims for review.
Output should be compact structured JSON suitable for downstream agents.
